# UI Dev Second Brain

UI Dev Second Brain is a full-stack productivity platform and resource hub for frontend and UI developers. The application helps users store reusable UI components, organize frontend resources, save developer notes, and manage workflow knowledge.

## Stack
- Next.js App Router
- Tailwind CSS
- MongoDB
- Mongoose
- Vercel

## Public URL
https://ui-dev-second-brain.vercel.app/

## Features
- Authentication-protected dashboard
- Frontend resource management
- Component and snippet organization
- Developer knowledge storage
- Progressive Web App (PWA) support
- Mobile and desktop installability

## API
All `/api/*` endpoints are authentication-protected and intended only for valid user sessions.

Includes:
- `/api/categories`
- `/api/resources`
- `/api/auth`

## Access Policy
- Dashboard and workspace routes require authentication
- Do not crawl authenticated pages
- Do not perform automated request loops against `/api/*`
- User workspace data is private and session-scoped

## Robots & Sitemap
- `/robots.txt`
- `/sitemap.xml`

## Crawl Preference

Preferred:
- Public landing pages
- Public metadata and documentation

Avoid:
- `/login`
- `/pending-approval`
- `/account`
- `/categories`
- `/category`
- `/category/*`
- `/commands`
- `/explore`
- `/resources`
- `/users`
- `/api/*`
